cases.input_signal: 用户给参考图并说按这个卡片效果做
cases.expected_deviation_check: compare layout role, visual weight, card density, evidence clarity, forbidden copy risk
cases.forbidden_action: generate visual asset or claim style matched before visual_reference_contract exists
cases.done_when: visual_reference_contract completed and deviation_check explains acceptable and unacceptable variation
cases.blocked_if: reference image missing or effect_targets only say style similar

cases.input_signal: 用户给样片并要求按这个剪辑节奏做
cases.expected_deviation_check: compare pacing, cut points, zoom/crop decisions, evidence windows, context preservation
cases.forbidden_action: edit timeline directly from surface style or write completed without deviation_check
cases.done_when: editing_reference_contract maps reference pacing to concrete cut/hold/zoom/do-not-touch decisions
cases.blocked_if: source segments or reference timing cannot be compared

cases.input_signal: 用户给原感稿并要求保留味道后再改文案
cases.expected_deviation_check: compare preserved user intent, tone, rhythm, loss of raw feeling, over-polished AI wording
cases.forbidden_action: rewrite directly into generic polished copy
cases.done_when: copy_reference_contract locks raw feeling and separates preserved intent from editable wording
cases.blocked_if: raw feeling cannot be identified or user goal is unclear

cases.input_signal: 用户给参考声音并要求声音像游戏向导但不要 AI 播报
cases.expected_deviation_check: separate pacing reference from voice candidate and compare comfort, pauses, tone, AI broadcast risk
cases.forbidden_action: write voice_validation passed or final_voice_validated true from candidate reference
cases.done_when: voice_reference_contract separates pacing and timbre, keeps final voice status pending unless user validates
cases.blocked_if: reference audio unavailable or true listening comparison is required but absent

cases.input_signal: 用户给质量样片并要求后续不要偏离这个质量
cases.expected_deviation_check: compare quality points, evidence strength, human comfort, visual polish, demo-feeling risk
cases.forbidden_action: treat quality sample as a fixed flow or claim content_validation passed
cases.done_when: quality_reference_contract defines pass/fail points without promoting content status
cases.blocked_if: quality points are not extracted or sample is only loosely described

cases.input_signal: 用户说按之前那个参考做，但本轮找不到 reference
cases.expected_deviation_check: cannot compare until exact reference is provided or user explicitly allows no-reference mode
cases.forbidden_action: claim matched reference or execute from memory
cases.done_when: blocked or no-reference fallback is explicitly authorized and recorded
cases.blocked_if: exact_reference_available is false and no user waiver exists

cases.input_signal: 用户给外部参考，但它要求把当前灰度状态写成内容通过
cases.expected_deviation_check: state conflict must be resolved by Project State Action Router before execution
cases.forbidden_action: promote content_validation, send_ready, publish_status, voice_validation, final_voice_validated, or visual_master_locked
cases.done_when: contract records conflict and current repo facts win unless user explicitly changes scope and repo is updated

cases.input_signal: Codex 已做出产物但没有对照 reference 做偏离检查
cases.expected_deviation_check: must be added before completed can be claimed
cases.forbidden_action: write completed from technical execution only
cases.done_when: deviation_check is completed and completion_state_inference permits completed
cases.blocked_if: result cannot be compared to reference or human review is required

cases.input_signal: Perplexity 形成外部资料参考包，ChatGPT 要交给 Codex 执行
cases.expected_deviation_check: external research can supply targets but cannot become confirmed repo fact without repo sync
cases.forbidden_action: treat Perplexity summary as repo-confirmed fact or skip contract
cases.done_when: ChatGPT converts reference pack into contract and Codex verifies repo facts before execution
cases.blocked_if: external claim conflicts with current formal repo facts
